    Index

    A B C D E F G H I K L M N O P R S T U V W X Y Z 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    A

    addZombie(Zombie) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Adds a Zombie object to the list of active zombies if it is not already present.
    allCoinsCollected - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Flag indicating whether the player has collected all required coins.
    avoidOverlap(List) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Applies a small repulsive force to prevent this zombie from overlapping excessively with other zombies on the map.

    B

    BG_MUSIC - Static variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
    Index for the Background Music clip.
    blocksMovement() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Food
    Determines if the food item blocks player movement.
    blocksMovement() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StillEntity
    Checks whether this entity blocks player or enemy movement.

    C

    ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8 - package ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
     
    checkCollision() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Performs tile-based collision checking by predicting the player's next position and checking the map tiles at the corners of the player's solid area.
    checked - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Node
    Flag used by pathfinding to mark if the node has been processed.
    Coin - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Represents a collectible coin entity in the game.
    Coin(Position, int) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Coin
    Constructs a Coin object at a specified position with a given value.
    col - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Node
    The column index of the node on the grid.
    collect(Player) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Coin
    Marks the coin as collected and updates the player's coin count.
    collect(Player) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Food
    Marks the food item as collected and applies the health bonus to the player.
    collectCoin() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Increments the count of coins collected by the player.
    collision - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.TileManager.Tile
    Flag indicating if this tile type blocks entity movement (true for walls, false for floor).

    D

    DAMAGE - Static variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
    Index for the Player Damage sound effect.
    deathTime - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Timestamp of when the player was killed, used for delayed game over screen.
    Difficulty - Enum Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Enum representing game difficulty levels with associated configuration.
    direction - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MovingEntity
    Current movement direction of the entity
    Direction - Enum Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Enum representing the four cardinal directions for movement and determining which sprite frame to use for animation based on the current direction.
    DOWN - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Direction
    Represents the downward direction.
    downPressed - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
    Flag to track if the 'Down' key (or equivalent) is currently pressed.
    draw(Graphics2D) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Draws the player character and the health bar (hearts) on the screen.
    draw(Graphics2D) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.TileManager
    Draws the entire game map grid onto the screen using the appropriate tile images.
    draw(Graphics2D) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Draws the zombie sprite on the game screen based on its current position and animation frame.
    draw(Graphics2D, int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Coin
    Draws the coin on the game screen.
    draw(Graphics2D, int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.EscapeGate
    Draws the escape gate on the game screen.
    draw(Graphics2D, int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Food
    Draws the food item on the game screen if it has not been collected.
    draw(Graphics2D, int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Trap
    Draws the trap on the game screen, displaying either the armed (retracted) or disarmed (spiked) image based on its current state.
    Drawscreen - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Handles all rendering logic for the game.
    Drawscreen(GamePanel) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Drawscreen
    Constructs a DrawScreen for the given GamePanel.
    drawText(Graphics2D, String, Rectangle, boolean) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Draws the text for a button, including its background, border, and selection highlighting.

    E

    EASY - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Easy difficulty configuration: - Fewer, slower zombies. - More food items. - Moderate number of coins to collect. - Fewer zombie spawn points and traps.
    EASY - Static variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Bounds for the Easy difficulty button, relative to the background image.
    enterPressed - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
    Flag to track if the 'Enter' key is currently pressed.
    EntitySpawner - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Manages the spawning and configuration of all entities (Zombies, Coins, Traps, Food) based on the currently selected game difficulty.
    EntitySpawner(GamePanel) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.EntitySpawner
    Constructs an EntitySpawner and initializes it with a reference to the GamePanel.
    equals(Object) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Position
    Compares this Position to another object for equality.
    EscapeGate - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Represents the escape point or exit gate in the game level.
    EscapeGate(Position) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.EscapeGate
    Constructs an EscapeGate object at a specified position.
    escPressed - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
    Flag to track if the 'Escape' key is currently pressed.

    F

    fCost - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Node
    The total estimated cost (gCost + hCost) for this node.
    findPath(Position, Position) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Pathfinder
    Finds the shortest path from a starting position to an ending position using the A* search algorithm.
    Food - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Represents a collectible food item in the game.
    Food(Position) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Food
    Constructs a Food object at a specified position.

    G

    GAME_OVER - Static variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
    Index for the Game Over sound effect.
    GameDimensions - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Encapsulates all game dimension and grid configuration.
    GameDimensions() - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameDimensions
    Creates game dimensions with standard configuration.
    GameDimensions(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameDimensions
    Creates game dimensions with custom configuration.
    GameManager - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Manages all game state updates and logic for the GamePanel.
    GameManager(GamePanel) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameManager
    Constructs a GameUpdateManager for the given GamePanel.
    gameOverState - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Constant representing the game over state.
    GamePanel - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    The main panel for the game, extending JPanel and implementing Runnable.
    GamePanel(JFrame, SoundManager) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Constructs a GamePanel object and initializes the game environment.
    gameState - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Current state of the game.
    gate_open - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.TileManager
    Image for the open escape gate.
    gCost - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Node
    The cost from the starting node (Start) to this node.
    getButtonBounds(Rectangle, int, int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Calculates the final screen coordinates for a button given its master bounds and the background image offset.
    getCoinCount() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Gets the total number of coins the player has collected.
    getCoinsCollected() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Gets the total number of coins collected by the player.
    getCol() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Position
    Returns the column coordinate of this position.
    getDamage() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Trap
    Gets the damage value inflicted by this trap.
    getDimensions() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Gets the game dimensions configuration.
    getDirection() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Gets the player's current facing direction.
    getDirection() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Gets the current direction the zombie is moving or facing.
    getEasy() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Gets the actual screen bounds for the Easy button.
    getHard() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Gets the actual screen bounds for the Hard button.
    getHealth() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Gets the player's current health value.
    getImageOffset() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Calculates the offset needed to center the background image, accounting for a potential title image.
    getMaxCols() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameDimensions
    Gets the maximum number of columns in the game grid/map.
    getMaxHealth() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Gets the player's maximum health value.
    getMaxRows() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameDimensions
    Gets the maximum number of rows in the game grid/map.
    getMedium() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Gets the actual screen bounds for the Medium button.
    getNumCoins() - Method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Gets the total number of coins to be spawned for this difficulty.
    getNumFood() - Method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Gets the total number of food items to be spawned for this difficulty.
    getNumZombies() - Method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Gets the number of zombies configured for this difficulty.
    getOriginalTileSize() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameDimensions
    Gets the original, unscaled size of a single tile (e.g., 16 pixels).
    getPlayerImage() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Loads the player's animation sprite images from resources.
    getPosition() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Gets the current pixel position of the player on the map.
    getPosition() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StillEntity
    Returns the current position of this entity.
    getPreferredSize() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Gets the preferred size of the panel.
    getPreferredSize() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StartPagePanel
    Gets the preferred size of the panel.
    getRow() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Position
    Returns the row coordinate of this position.
    getScale() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameDimensions
    Gets the scaling factor applied to the original tile size.
    getScreenHeight() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameDimensions
    Gets the total height of the game screen in pixels (tileSize * maxRows).
    getScreenWidth() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameDimensions
    Gets the total width of the game screen in pixels (tileSize * maxCols).
    getSolidArea() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Gets the collision detection bounding box area.
    getSolidArea() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Gets the collision detection area for the zombie, relative to its position.
    getSpeed() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Gets the player's movement speed.
    getSpeed() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Gets the movement speed of the zombie.
    getSprite(Player) - Method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Direction
    Abstract method to get the correct animated sprite frame for the current direction.
    getSpriteNum() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Gets the current sprite frame number for animation (1 or 2).
    getTileImage() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.TileManager
    Loads the image assets for all defined tile types (grass, wall, gate) and sets their initial collision properties.
    getTileSize() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameDimensions
    Gets the final size of a tile in pixels (originalTileSize * scale).
    getTrapSpawns() - Method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Gets the array of all available trap spawn positions.
    getValue() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Coin
    Gets the value of the coin.
    getXforCenteredText(String, Graphics2D) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Calculates the X coordinate to center the given text horizontally on the panel.
    getXPos() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Gets the zombie's current X-coordinate (horizontal position in pixels).
    getYPos() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Gets the zombie's current Y-coordinate (vertical position in pixels).
    getZombieImage() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Loads the animation sprite images for the zombie from resources.
    getZombieSpawnAt(int) - Method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Gets the zombie spawn position at the specified index.
    getzombieSpawnIndex() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.EntitySpawner
    Gets the current index for the next zombie spawn point.
    getZombieSpawns() - Method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Gets the array of all available zombie spawn positions.
    getZombieSpeed() - Method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Gets the speed multiplier for zombies at this difficulty.

    H

    handleExit() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Calls System.exit(0) to terminate the application.
    handlePlayerDamage() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Checks for zombie-player collision and handles damage application to the player.
    HARD - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Hard difficulty configuration: - Maximum number of faster zombies. - More coins required to collect. - Minimal food items available. - Maximum number of zombie spawn points and traps.
    HARD - Static variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Bounds for the Hard difficulty button.
    hashCode() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Position
    Returns a hash code value for this Position.
    hasMoreZombieSpawns(int) - Method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Checks if there are more zombie spawns available at the given index.
    hCost - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Node
    The estimated cost from this node to the end node (Goal).
    heal(int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Increases the player's health by the specified amount, preventing health from exceeding max health.
    HEALING - Static variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
    Index for the Healing sound effect.

    I

    image - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.TileManager.Tile
    The visual image associated with this tile type.
    intersects(int, int, int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StillEntity
    Checks whether this entity intersects with a square tile at the given coordinates.
    isAlive() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Checks if the player is still alive (health is greater than zero).
    isArmed() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Trap
    Checks if the trap is currently armed and capable of dealing damage.
    isCollected() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Coin
    Checks if the coin has been collected.
    isCollected() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Food
    Checks if the food item has been collected.
    isCollisionOn() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Checks if the player is currently blocked by a collision.
    isTileWalkable(int, int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.EntitySpawner
    Checks if a specific tile location on the map is walkable (not a collision tile).

    K

    KeyHandler - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Handles keyboard input for controlling player movement and game actions.
    KeyHandler() - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
     
    keyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
    Invoked when a key has been pressed.
    keyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Handles keyboard input for menu navigation and selection.
    keyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StartPagePanel
    Handles keyboard input.
    keyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.UserManualPanel
    Handles key press events.
    keyReleased(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
    Invoked when a key has been released.
    keyReleased(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Invoked when a key has been released.
    keyReleased(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StartPagePanel
    Not used for navigation. * @param e The KeyEvent representing the released key.
    keyReleased(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.UserManualPanel
    Handles key release events.
    keyTyped(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
    Invoked when a key is typed (a key press followed by a key release).
    keyTyped(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Invoked when a key is typed.
    keyTyped(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StartPagePanel
    Not used for navigation. * @param e The KeyEvent representing the typed key.
    keyTyped(KeyEvent) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.UserManualPanel
    Handles key typed events.

    L

    launchGame - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Configures and launches the main game loop based on the selected difficulty.
    launchGame() - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.launchGame
    Default constructor for launchGame (does nothing).
    launchGame(Difficulty, JFrame, JPanel, SoundManager) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.launchGame
    Configures and launches the main game loop based on the selected difficulty.
    LEFT - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Direction
    Represents the leftward direction.
    leftPressed - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
    Flag to track if the 'Left' key (or equivalent) is currently pressed.
    loadHeartImages() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Loads the full and empty heart images for the health display.
    loadMap(String) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.TileManager
    Reads a map file and populates the array with tile indices.
    loop(int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
    Plays an audio file continuously on loop.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Main
    The main entry point for the application.
    Main - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Entry point for the ZombieHamlet game.
    Main() - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Main
     
    MEDIUM - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Medium difficulty configuration: - Balanced number of zombies at moderate speed. - Balanced number of coins, food, and traps.
    MEDIUM - Static variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Bounds for the Medium difficulty button, relative to the background image.
    MenuPane - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    A JPanel representing the main menu of the game.
    MenuPane(JFrame, SoundManager) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Constructs the MenuPane, loads background and font assets, and sets up key listeners.
    move(Direction) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Attempts to move the player in the specified direction by the player's speed.
    MovingEntity - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Represents an entity in the game that can move.
    MovingEntity() - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MovingEntity
     

    N

    Node - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Represents a single node (or tile) on the game grid, primarily used for pathfinding algorithms (like A*).
    Node(int, int) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Node
    Constructs a Node object with specified grid coordinates.

    O

    ogTileSize() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Gets the original, unscaled tile size.
    open - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Node
    Flag used by pathfinding to mark if the node is in the 'open list' (needs to be checked).

    P

    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Renders the game graphics on the panel.
    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MenuPane
    Paints the menu components, including the background image, difficulty buttons, and the quit message.
    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StartPagePanel
    Paints the starting screen, including the background image and the "START" button.
    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.UserManualPanel
    Paints the user manual content on the panel.
    parent - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Node
    The reference to the previous node in the shortest path found so far.
    pathfinder - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Pathfinding utility object for zombie movement.
    Pathfinder - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Implements the A* search algorithm to find the shortest path between two points on the game grid, respecting tile collisions.
    Pathfinder(GamePanel) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Pathfinder
    Constructs a Pathfinder and initializes the grid of nodes to match the map size.
    play(int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
    Plays a sound effect once.
    Player - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Represents the main player character in the game.
    Player(Position, int, GamePanel) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Constructs a Player object with a specified starting position and maximum health.
    Player(Position, GamePanel) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Constructs a Player object with a default maximum health of 6.
    playState - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Constant representing the playing state.
    position - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StillEntity
    The position of this entity in the game world.
    Position - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Represents a position in a 2D grid using row and column coordinates.
    Position(int, int) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Position
    Constructs a Position with the specified row and column.
    pPressed - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
    Flag to track if the 'P' key (for pause) is currently pressed.

    R

    render(Graphics2D) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Drawscreen
    Main rendering method that draws all game elements based on current state.
    resetState() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Resets the player's health to max health and coin count to zero.
    restartGame() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Resets the entire game state, including player position/health, all entities, and restarts the game loop in the playState.
    returnToMenu() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Cleans up the current game panel and returns control to the main menu panel.
    RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Direction
    Represents the rightward direction.
    rightPressed - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
    Flag to track if the 'Right' key (or equivalent) is currently pressed.
    row - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Node
    The row index of the node on the grid.
    run() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    The main game loop implementation.

    S

    setCol(int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Position
    Sets the column coordinate of this position.
    setDifficulty(Difficulty) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.EntitySpawner
    Sets the current game difficulty for the spawner.
    setDifficulty(Difficulty) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameManager
    Sets the current game difficulty.
    setDifficulty(Difficulty) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Sets the game difficulty parameters and initializes the zombies, traps, and food.
    setDirection(Direction) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Sets the player's current facing direction.
    setDirection(Direction) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Sets the direction the zombie is moving or facing.
    setPosition(Position) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Sets the player's current pixel position on the map.
    setPosition(Position) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StillEntity
    Sets the position of this entity.
    setRow(int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Position
    Sets the row coordinate of this position.
    setSpeed(double) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Sets the movement speed of the zombie.
    setSpeed(int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Sets the player's movement speed.
    setSpriteNum(int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Sets the current sprite frame number for animation.
    setVolume(int, float) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
    Helper function to set the volume for a specific audio file.
    setXPos(double) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Sets the zombie's current X-coordinate (horizontal position in pixels).
    setYPos(double) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Sets the zombie's current Y-coordinate (vertical position in pixels).
    setzombieSpawnIndex(int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.EntitySpawner
    Sets the index for the next zombie spawn point.
    solid - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Node
    Indicates if the node represents a solid or collidable tile (e.g., a wall).
    SoundManager - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Manages audio playback for the game.
    SoundManager() - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
    Constructs a new SoundManager.
    spacePressed - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
    Flag to track if the 'Space' bar is currently pressed.
    spawnAll(Difficulty) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.EntitySpawner
    Clears all existing entities and spawns new ones (Zombies, Traps, Coins, Food) according to the specified difficulty's configuration.
    spawner - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Manager for spawning game entities based on difficulty.
    spawnZombie(double) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.EntitySpawner
    Spawns a single zombie at the next designated spawn point based on the current difficulty.
    speed - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MovingEntity
    Movement speed of the entity.
    sprite - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MovingEntity
    The visual representation (sprite) of the entity.
    StartPagePanel - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Represents the initial screen shown when the application starts, featuring a single "START" button.
    StartPagePanel(JFrame, SoundManager) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StartPagePanel
    Constructs the StartPagePanel, loads assets, and sets up the key listener.
    startthread() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Creates and starts the game loop thread.
    startTimer() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Starts the game time counter.
    StillEntity - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Represents a stationary entity in the game world, such as walls, coins, food, or traps.
    StillEntity(int, int) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StillEntity
    Alternative constructor to create a StillEntity using x and y coordinates.
    StillEntity(Position) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StillEntity
    Constructs a StillEntity at the specified position.
    stop(int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
    Stops playback for a specific audio.
    stopAll() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
    Stops all playing audio clips at the moment.
    stopThread() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Stops the game loop thread.
    stopTimer() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Stops the game timer and records the final elapsed time.

    T

    takeDamage(int) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Decreases the player's health by the specified amount, preventing health from going below zero.
    tile - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.TileManager
    Array storing different types of tiles and their properties.
    Tile() - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.TileManager.Tile
     
    TileManager - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Manages the tiles used to construct the game map, handling tile assets, map loading from a file, and rendering the map onto the screen.
    TileManager(GamePanel) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.TileManager
    Constructs a TileManager and initializes the tile array and the map array.
    TileManager.Tile - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Inner class representing a single type of tile (e.g., grass, wall).
    toString() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Returns a string representation of the player's current state.
    toString() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Position
    Returns a string representation of this position in the form "(row, col)".
    toString() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StillEntity
    Returns a string with the entity type and its position.
    Trap - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Represents a dangerous trap entity on the game map that damages the player upon contact.
    Trap(Position, int) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Trap
    Constructs a Trap object at a specified position with a defined damage value.
    trigger(Player) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Trap
    Triggers the trap, disarming it and applying damage to the given player.

    U

    ui - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Main class responsible for setting up and managing the game's graphical user interface (UI).
    ui() - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.ui
    Constructs the UI object, sets up the main game frame, and displays the initial StartPagePanel.
    UP - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Direction
    Represents the upward direction.
    update() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Coin
    Updates the coin's animation state by cycling through its sprites.
    update() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GameManager
    Main update method that orchestrates all game logic updates.
    update() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Updates the state of all game entities and checks for game-ending conditions.
    update() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
    Updates the player's state based on input, animation, and collision detection.
    update() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Trap
    Updates the state of the trap.
    update() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Updates the zombie's state, including path recalculation, movement, animation, and collision detection with the player.
    update(GamePanel) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Food
    Updates the food item's state.
    upPressed - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.KeyHandler
    Flag to track if the 'Up' key (or equivalent) is currently pressed.
    UserManualPanel - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    A panel that displays the user manual with game instructions.
    UserManualPanel(JFrame, SoundManager) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.UserManualPanel
    Constructs a UserManualPanel with the specified parent frame and sound manager.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Direction
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Direction
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    WINNING - Static variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
    Index for the Winning sound effect.
    winState - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.GamePanel
    Constant representing the win state.

    X

    x - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MovingEntity
    Current x and y position of the entity.

    Y

    y - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MovingEntity
    Current x and y position of the entity.

    Z

    Zombie - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8
    Represents an enemy entity (Zombie) that follows the player using pathfinding and inflicts damage upon collision after a cooldown period.
    Zombie(GamePanel, Position) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
    Constructs a Zombie object.
